Sliding table + extra table for passenger seat. Internal touch LED lighting system.
Power management system 12v and 240v.
Onboard water tank. Water gauge and battery level indicators.
Double 240 volt socket.
Wireless phone charger pad and usb points.
230v campsite hook-up cable.
